mapping_policy.api_read_pending_p3: api_read: browser/API read verification remains P3 evidence, but row requires read-depth runtime proof.
mapping_policy.api_write_pending_p4: api_write: write/audit/permission proof remains P4/P5 evidence, but row requires write-depth runtime proof.
mapping_policy.missing_handler: ui_state_only: source/DOM shows no effective handler; no deeper runtime can be claimed until remediation.
mapping_policy.no_handler: ui_state_only: visible affordance lacks an operational handler; no deeper runtime can be claimed until remediation.
mapping_policy.no_effect_visible_row: ui_state_only: row is visible/selectable-looking but source/DOM shows no effect.
mapping_policy.route_without_section_surface: route_navigation: route/hash changes are the deepest confirmed behavior; expected section surface is absent and remains FAIL.

changed_rows.label: People header refresh on standalone HRX panels
